blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,771 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 25".
